module:
Global pytest fixtures and configuration.

This file contains fixtures that are available to all tests,
particularly those related to cross-subsystem functionality.

register_test_backends.docstring: Register test implementations of vector backends.

setup_vector_backends.docstring: Automatically setup vector backends for all tests.

reset_registries.docstring: Reset all registries between tests to prevent cross-test state leakage.

sample_texts.docstring: Provide sample texts for various content types.
